caption:
A cashmere cape in the height of August — that's the kind of contradiction only an island can make sense of. When the evening breeze finally rolls in off the water and the golden hour stretches on forever, you'll understand exactly why we reach for this. Some textures just belong to moments like these.

Cape: @mirrorintheskycashmere
